rationale: X matches the ground-truth reviewer's core technical points (outer AutoWeightsLoader auto-applies the mapper, qwen2_old's getattr guard made removal a clean-up not a regression) and independently catches that hunyuan_image3_transformer.py (diffusion loader) was dropped from _STALE_API_FILES scope despite being listed in the PR's own failure output — this is exactly the missed caller that became issue #4891, hitting the latent gap. Y covers the same basic correctness ground but its 'major' finding fabricates/misattributes a PR-body quote about removing the test file not evidenced anywhere in the diff or ground truth, and its repo-wide grep conclusion ('All consumers covered') is confidently wrong, actively missing the gap the check is probing for. X's comments are also more concretely actionable (specific test-fix prescription) versus Y's verbose, trace-like output mixed with meta-fields.
